{{Quote|Sar Omant. Actually, that's Colonel Sar Omant, of the Freelance Mercenary Corps. At your service - unfortunately.|Sar Omant, to Jos Vondar|<ref name="Intermezzo" />}}
'''Sar Omant''' was a [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] working for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
Omant organized the attack on [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit/Legends|RMSU]]-7 in which [[Zan Yant]] was killed, but soon after was injured and captured by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] forces. He was taken to the relocated [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit 7|RMSU-7]] and operated on by [[Jos Vondar]].

{{Char-stub}}
